title: Hide Armor Mod
description: Simple Mod to toggle the visibility of your armor.
body:
**Hide Armor Mod** is a simple and lightweight mod for Minecraft that lets you control the visibility of your armor.

## Features

* Toggle the visibility of your armor using the default keybinding `H`.

* You can also disable the toggling of specific armor parts through [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)

## Installation

Simply drop the mod into your `mods` folder. 
No other mods or additional setup (not even Fabric API!) are required.

## Configuration

**Hide Armor Mod** uses the popular configuration library [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) together with [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu), allowing you to fully customize the mod’s appearance. You can also disable the toggling of specific parts and decide if you only want to hide your or everyones armor.

## Future

* Add more version support

* Add compatibility for more loaders
